prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, construct a potent protein binder targeting Glycoprotein (viral surface glycoprotein) expressed by Marburg virus. The binder should achieve sub-nanomolar binding. detail a workflow for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using RoseTTAFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Glycoprotein; organism: Marburg virus; catalogue version v1.0
